description: Control a web browser: navigate, screenshot, extract text, click elements, type text, run JavaScript, save PDFs, list/switch tabs. Also crawl sites, fetch RSS/Atom feeds, and archive pages. Supports standalone headless mode and live-connect to a running browser.

url.description: URL to navigate to (required for navigate action)

selector.description: CSS selector for click, type, screenshot, is_visible, select, hover, scroll, or wait actions

x.description: Horizontal scroll amount in pixels (default 0, used with y for scroll action)

y.description: Vertical scroll amount in pixels (used with scroll action when no selector given)

ms.description: Milliseconds to wait, or timeout for selector wait (default 1000, for wait action)

selectors.description: List of CSS selectors for extract action

text.description: Text to type into an element (required for type action)

script.description: JavaScript code to evaluate in the page (required for evaluate action)

value.description: Option value to select in a <select> element (required for select action unless label is given)

label.description: Option label text to select in a <select> element (required for select action unless value is given)

path.description: File path to save PDF (optional, defaults to temp file for pdf action)

profile.description: Profile name for persistent browser context (headless only, ignored in live-connect mode)

tab_id.description: Tab index to switch to (required for switch_tab action)

connect_url.description: WebSocket URL to connect to an already-running browser (e.g., ws://127.0.0.1:9222/...). If omitted, launches a headless browser.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages to crawl (default: 20, for crawl action)

same_domain.description: Only follow links to the same domain (default: true, for crawl action)

archive_dir.description: Directory to save archived pages (default: ~/.config/shem/archive, for archive_page action)
